title: Building with Anthropic's Fable 5 LIVE - Is It Really Worth the Hype?
summary: Cole Medin tests Anthropic's Fable 5 model in a live stream to evaluate whether it justifies the hype and its 2x price premium over Claude Opus 4.8. The model is presented as Anthropic's most capable release to date.
writeup: Cole Medin tests Anthropic's Fable 5, presented as the company's most capable release to date, in a live stream that puts the model through hands-on building tasks. The central question is whether Fable 5 justifies its 2x price premium over Claude Opus 4.8. The session frames the evaluation around real-time performance rather than benchmarks alone, weighing capability gains against the higher inference cost.
